summary: Comprehensive testing of variant features in LogiFlow Pro delivery management app. All 13 features verified working: Variant CRUD (backend + frontend), POS compact list with variant dialog, editable price, unified Customer Notes field, order type badges, free gift, and inventory delete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_UI_Variant_Item during testing (deleted after test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All variant features verified working: 1) Inventory CRUD with variants array - POST/GET/PUT all work, variants saved with name+price. 2) POS compact list shows items with Layers badge and price range for variants. 3) Variant dialog shows selectable buttons for each variant, price auto-fills on selection. 4) Price is editable for discounts. 5) Cart shows variant name in parentheses e.g. 'Test Smoothie (Large)'. 6) Orders page shows variant name in item display. 7) Unified 'Customer Notes / Instructions' field label. 8) Order type badges (Pickup=violet, Delivery=blue) visible on all orders. 9) Free Gift dropdown works, shows '(Free)' label in order. 10) Cancel button on pending orders. 11) Inventory Delete works with confirmation. 12) Boss Settings has split rates (Per Delivery Rate + Per Pickup Rate) with Active badges. 13) Boss Inventory shows variant badges and pricing.

variant_crud_backend.verification: 14/14 pytest tests passed - variants saved and returned correctly

variant_crud_frontend_add.description: Add Item dialog with variant form
variant_crud_frontend_add.verification: Created item with 2 variants (Small/$4.99, Large/$7.99), '2 variants' badge visible

variant_crud_frontend_edit.verification: Edit dialog shows variant rows with existing values

pos_compact_list.verification: Products shown in scrollable list with name, price range, stock

pos_search_filter.verification: Search input filters products by name

variant_selection_dialog.description: Dialog shows variant options as selectable buttons
variant_selection_dialog.verification: Clicked Test Drink, dialog showed Small/Large buttons with prices

editable_price.description: Price is editable in variant dialog
editable_price.verification: Changed price from $4.99 to $3.99, cart showed custom price

product_without_variants.description: Products without variants show just editable price
product_without_variants.verification: AK-47 dialog showed only price input, no variant buttons

full_pos_order_flow.description: Complete order creation with variant, free gift, pickup type
full_pos_order_flow.verification: Created order with Test Smoothie (Large), AK-47 free gift, Pickup type - success toast shown

unified_notes_field.verification: Label visible in New Order page for both Delivery and Pickup

order_display_variant_name.description: Orders page shows variant name in item
order_display_variant_name.verification: Order shows '1x Test Smoothie (Large)' with variant in parentheses

inventory_delete.description: Delete button removes item from inventory
inventory_delete.verification: Deleted TEST_UI_Variant_Item, 'Item deleted' toast shown, item removed from list

boss_settings_split_rates.description: Boss Settings has Per Delivery Rate + Per Pickup Rate
boss_settings_split_rates.verification: Both inputs visible with 'Active' badges, values editable

boss_inventory_variants.description: Boss Inventory shows variant badges and pricing
boss_inventory_variants.verification: 3 items with '2 variants' badge, pricing shown as 'Small: $5.99 · Large: $8.99'
